title: Care for the whole circle
subtitle: Unlock everything CircleCare offers for your whole care circle.
trialHook: Start with a free trial — nothing due today.

benefits.members: Coordinate care across unlimited circle members
benefits.tools: Full access to the calendar, tasks, medications, documents, and vitals
benefits.sync: Everyone stays in sync, on every device

orUseApp: Prefer the app? You can also upgrade in the CircleCare app and pay through your app store.
unavailable: Online checkout isn't available right now. You can also upgrade in the CircleCare app.
error: Something went wrong starting checkout. Please try again.

alreadyPremium.title: You're already Premium
alreadyPremium.body: You have full access to all CircleCare features.
alreadyPremium.manageInApp: Manage your subscription in the CircleCare app where you purchased it.

success.title: Welcome to Premium!
success.body: Your subscription is active. Enjoy full access across your care circles.
